subject: Muk, a large amorphous sludge Pokemon with a wide mouth, oozing across the ground
description: A large purple blob creature spreads across the ground, its body amorphous and melting outward at the edges. A wide-open mouth with jagged irregular teeth dominates its upper face, and two small eyes sit above. The body has an oozing, liquid quality, spreading into a puddle around it. The background is soft blue-grey, giving the sludge creature contrast against the light tone. The creature projects a slow, toxic menace.
foreground: Muk oozing and spreading across ground, large open mouth visible
